title: masdevallia frilehmannii
intro: Masdevallia frilehmannii, also known as the Frilehmann's Masdevallia, is a type of orchid native to Peru, belonging to the Masdevallia genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Masdevallia frilehmannii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Masdevallia frilehmannii can be obtained in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
